title: poecilopteris costata var. undulata
intro: Poecilopteris costata var. undulata, commonly known as a type of fern, is a plant species known for its potential health benefits and therapeutic properties. This plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce stress and promote relaxation. The bioactive constituents of Poecilopteris costata var. undulata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its therapeutic actions such as lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. However, I could not find further information on the specific therapeutic actions of this plant, and more research is needed to confirm its health benefits.

side_effects: Poecilopteris costata var. undulata can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems.
